The classification of Rapuntium cavanillesianum places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Brassicales. The plant's scientific classification also includes the family Brassicaceae, which is a large family of flowering plants commonly known as mustards and cabbages.
